name: Krotos Studio
short_description: Design sound instantly — create and customise unique SFX; drag-and-drop into Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve, or use in your DAW for full creative control.
description: Design sound instantly. Create and customise your own unique sound effects. Easily drag and drop your sounds into Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve — or use it inside your DAW for full creative control.
